# shadcn/ui Skill

Use this skill when creating or refining UI components with shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4.

## Conventions
- Add components through CLI workflows; do not paste random snippets.
- Keep styles token-driven and consistent with design system semantics.
- Prefer composition and small reusable primitives.

## Quality
- Ensure keyboard navigation works.
- Ensure dark/light mode parity.
- Keep component API simple and explicit.
